testcase.name: test_inject_mismatch_and_cleanup

failure.message:
AssertionError: shift did not flip: {'shift_id': '84566ef1-68ef-44af-9ef7-5570befd61e0', 'cashier_name': 'كاشير اختبار', 'branch_id': '76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f', 'business_date': '2026-07-07', 'status': 'ok', 'stored': {'total_sales': 0.0, 'total_expenses': 0.0, 'total_orders': 0}, 'actual': {'total_sales': 0, 'total_expenses': 0, 'total_orders': 0}, 'closing_found': True, 'issues': []} assert 'ok' == 'mismatch'
- mismatch + ok

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_integrity_check.py:158: in test_inject_mismatch_and_cleanup assert flipped["status"] == "mismatch", f"shift did not flip: {flipped}" E AssertionError: shift did not flip: {'shift_id': '84566ef1-68ef-44af-9ef7-5570befd61e0', 'cashier_name': 'كاشير اختبار', 'branch_id': '76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f', 'business_date': '2026-07-07', 'status': 'ok', 'stored': {'total_sales': 0.0, 'total_expenses': 0.0, 'total_orders': 0}, 'actual': {'total_sales': 0, 'total_expenses': 0, 'total_orders': 0}, 'closing_found': True, 'issues': []} E assert 'ok' == 'mismatch' E E - mismatch E + ok
